message:
feat(types): Add UnifiedInt type and improve for-loop variable inference

- Add UnifiedInt type for Python integers that may be small or BigInt
- Add VarTypeContext for pre-scan type inference in function bodies
- Fix for-loop variable hoisting to correctly infer element types
- Handle round() with None/ndigits=None returning i64
- Handle -INF, -NAN, INF, NAN as f64 in collection literals
- Add PyInt object wrapper for BigInt operations
- Propagate unified_int through binary operations
